text:
(Rev. 10438, Issued: 11-06-20, Effective: 03-01-20, Implementation: 01- 11-21) 

Section 1861(m)of the Act governs the Medicare home health services that may be 
provided to eligible beneficiaries by or under arrangements made by a participating home 
health agency (HHA). Section 1861(m) describes home health services as 
 • Part-time or intermittent skilled nursing care (other than solely venipuncture for 
the purposes of obtaining a blood sample); 

• Part-time or intermittent home health
